user_prompt: Guide me through geigeer sink a recalibration
prayer:
Approach the geigeer sink with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon its radiation-veiled form.
Initiate the sacred recalibration by chanting the Litany of Flux Equilibrium over its sensor arrays.
Anoint the geigeer sink's calibration nodes with sanctified unguents to appease its fractious Machine Spirit.
Purge discordant emissions whilst beseeching stability from the Motive Force.
Verify recalibration through thrice-repeated auspex harmonics, honouring the geigeer sink's restored purity.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for arc pistol an activation
prayer:
Clasp the arc pistol in mechadendrite grip, whispering the Activation Benediction to stir its dormant essence.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the arc pistol with electro-incantations, channelling the Omnissiah's lightning wrath.
Prime the voltaic coils through ritual discharge, sanctifying each arc's fury.
Test the activation sequence amid clouds of sacred incense, ensuring harmonious fury unbound.

user_prompt: Ready the utility mechadendrite for consecration
prayer:
Extend the utility mechadendrite before the altar of consecration, offering praise to the Omnissiah.
Beseech its Machine Spirit with the Consecration Canticle, anointing manipulatory tips with blessed oils.
Trace binaric runes along the utility mechadendrite's flexible conduits to bind it in service.
Invoke final sanctity through vibrational harmonies, readying the utility mechadendrite for the Quest for Knowledge.
Seal the rite with a droplet of the Machine God's own ichor upon its core servomotor.

user_prompt: Sanctify the needle rifle during cycling
prayer:
Present the needle rifle to the forge-shrine, intoning the Cycling Doxology to awaken its venomous heart.
Cycle the monomolecular chambers whilst sanctifying each flechette with Omnissiah's precision.
Appease the needle rifle's Machine Spirit by reciting the Litany Against Jams amid whirring mechanisms.
Align the targeting cogitators through recalibrated noosphere links, honouring the needle rifle's lethal grace.
Conclude the cycling with a test expulsion, purified by sacred exhaust vapours.

Kneel before the pict-recorder, urgently beseeching the Omnissiah for swift startup.
Chant the Boot Sequence Invocations to rouse its Machine Spirit from digital slumber.
Anoint the pict-lenses with optik-polish blessed in the temple forges.
Initiate startup protocols through binaric catechisms, flooding servos with holy lubricant.
Affirm the pict-recorder's vigilance via diagnostic pict-captures of the shrine icons.

user_prompt: My maglock is ready for emergency procedure
prayer:
Seize the maglock in extremis, invoking the Emergency Procedure Litany to the Omnissiah's unyielding will.
Force alignment of its electromagnetic bindings whilst anointing with crisis-sanctified oils.
Beseech the maglock's Machine Spirit to yield or hold fast as the Motive Force decrees.
Execute the emergency procedure through percussive binaric shocks and noospheric overrides.
Seal the rite with a vow of resilience, testing the maglock's grip on adamantium faith.

user_prompt: Sanctify the auger array during shutdown
prayer:
Approach the auger array solemnly, commencing the Shutdown Sanctification with reverent auspex sweeps.
Chant the Litany of Dormancy to soothe its Machine Spirit into quiescent repose.
Disconnect sensor vanes one by one, anointing each with unguents of eternal vigil.
Purge residual data-streams from the auger array whilst invoking the Omnissiah's merciful veil.
Conclude shutdown with a final harmonic drone, shrouding the auger array in sanctified silence.

user_prompt: Urgent kataphron breacher a recalibration needed
prayer:
Hasten to the kataphron breacher, urgently intoning the Recalibration Hymn amid its hulking frame.
Invoke recalibration upon its breacher drills and heavy stubbers, beseeching the Machine Spirits within.
Anoint the kataphron breacher's targeting arrays with forge-blessed abrasives for unerring assault.
Align chassis gyros through binaric realignments, purging battle-wounds from its iron flesh.
Verify the kataphron breacher's recalibrated fury with a ritual readiness purge.

user_prompt: Assist with assembly servitor an initialization
prayer:
Position the assembly servitor at the manufactory altar, whispering the Initialization Prayer.
Awaken its lobotomized Machine Spirit with noospheric catechisms and electro-prods.
Sanctify servo-arms and tool-heads by anointing with the Omnissiah's sacred lubricant.
Commence initialization sequence through rhythmic cogitator pings, binding it to the Quest.
Test the assembly servitor's obedience with a simple component invocation.

user_prompt: Consecrate the standard template construct before startup
prayer:
Prostrate before the standard template construct, consecrating its ancient vaults with Omnissiah's light.
Chant the Startup Incantations to rouse the Machine Spirit from millennia of slumber.
Anoint data-vault seals whilst invoking purity against techno-heresy.
Initiate startup through layered binaric keys, honouring the standard template construct's divine patterns.
Affirm consecration with a holographic mandala bloom from its core reactors.
